response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and cloud technologies, exceeding the 15-year minimum with an MIT CS degree. His current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, combined with proven platform-building ability (GISCollective adopted by Green Map), demonstrates technical strength. However, for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy, the resume lacks clear evidence of shipped AI products with recognized impact, strategic advisory experience at scale, or thought leadership specifically in AI. The positioning reads as a strong technical contributor rather than a director-level strategist.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering across full-stack, cloud, infrastructure, and systems—exceeds minimum and demonstrates broad technical depth applicable to strategic advisory work
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing hands-on recent engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies and ability to contribute to platform-level work
Proven track record building and maintaining open-source platforms (GISCollective, adopted by Green Map) while holding IC roles, demonstrating both entrepreneurial mindset and execution capability
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI product impact—while currently working on AI infrastructure, resume shows no evidence of shipped AI-powered products or platforms that achieved recognized adoption or market success, which the role explicitly requires
Resume emphasizes technical execution and individual contributor work rather than strategic leadership, organizational influence, or mentorship scope typical of director-level principal roles
Missing Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (listed as preferred); for an AI Strategy principal role, advanced degree in AI would significantly strengthen candidacy and credibility

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and technical breadth
Demonstrated AI products and strategic thought leadership
Strategic/director-level positioning vs. IC execution focus
